The '''Third Fleet''' of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] was one of the main concentrations of Alliance capital ships during the latter portion of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was formed out of the [[New Republic Third Fleet|New Republic Third Battle Group]].

==History==
Initially under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], the Third Fleet was deployed along the Alliance-held portions of the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]], deploying during the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]] via the [[Shawken Spur]] during the battle. Following the end of the war and the subsequent peace, the Third Fleet was redeployed to patrol other regions of the galaxy, leaving the newly assembled [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleet]] to patrol the vast expanse of the Hydian Way. It was based at the [[General Crix Madine Military Reserve]].

During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], the Third Fleet was assigned to the [[blockade of Corellia]]. It was under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Makin]]. A task force of the Third Fleet fought at the [[Second Battle of Fondor]].

==Known ships==
*[[Ocean (starship)|''Ocean'']]
*Assorted cruisers
*Assorted destroyers
*Picket destroyers
